auth.email_sent_body_login: We sent a sign-in link to {email}
auth.email_sent_hint_reset: Click the link in the email to reset your password. The link is valid for 1 hour.
auth.email_sent_hint_login: Click the link in the email to sign in. The link is valid for 1 hour.
auth.callback_error_title: The reset link did not work
auth.callback_error_body: The link has expired or has already been used.
auth.bankid_no_account_body: We did not find an account linked to your BankID. Sign in with email below and then link BankID in settings.
auth.bankid_unavailable_body: If you created your account with BankID you can use "Forgot password?" to get a sign-in link by email.
auth.terms_prefix: By signing in you agree to our

settings.language_description: Choose the language for the interface. Invoices and reports always stay in Swedish.

help.title: Help & Glossary
help.subtitle: Definitions of Swedish tax and bookkeeping terms (in Swedish — these terms appear in your dealings with Skatteverket).
help.templates_subtitle: Statutory templates for your bookkeeping — download, fill in, and save
help.support_subtitle: Can't find what you're looking for? Contact us and we'll help.

pending.title: Review
pending.subtitle: Operations waiting for approval
pending.empty_pending_description: When an operation needs approval it will appear here for review.
pending.empty_finished_description: Operations you have approved or rejected appear here.
pending.bulk_confirm_footer: Operations run in order. Failed ones are skipped and reported afterwards.

assets.title: Fixed assets

register.subtitle: Create an account to get started
register.bankid_unavailable_body: Create an account with email and password below instead. You can link BankID in settings later.
register.invite_email_hint: The invitation was sent to this address.

register.weak_password_description: Password must be at least 8 characters and include uppercase, lowercase, digits, and a special character.
register.password_mismatch_description: Check that you typed the same password in both fields.
register.duplicate_body_prefix: There is already an account linked to

register.confirm_email_body: We sent a confirmation link to {email}
register.confirm_email_hint: Click the link in the email to activate your account. The link is valid for 24 hours.

mfa.verify_subtitle_full: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app

reset_password.saved_description: You can now sign in with your new password.

form_customer.vat_hint_eu: Verify the VAT number to invoice with reverse charge (0% VAT)

form_customer.language_hint: Invoices and emails to this customer are sent in the chosen language. Does not affect how the invoice is booked.

new_user_checklist.intro: Start by importing your bookkeeping, then connect your bank. Nothing changes in your current system.
new_user_checklist.migrate_description: Nothing changes in your existing system.
new_user_checklist.sie_description: Export a SIE4 file from your current bookkeeping software and upload it here.
new_user_checklist.bank_description_psd2: Connect via PSD2 — transactions sync automatically every day.
new_user_checklist.bank_description_file: Import bank statements from your bank — CSV, OFX and most Swedish banks.
new_user_checklist.skatteverket_connected_description: You can now submit momsdeklaration and AGI directly, and see the balance on your skattekonto.
new_user_checklist.skatteverket_connect_description: Submit momsdeklaration and arbetsgivardeklaration directly, and fetch the balance on your skattekonto — without leaving {appName}.
new_user_checklist.fresh_start: I'm starting a new business with no prior bookkeeping
new_user_checklist.security_note: Your data is encrypted and stored securely in Sweden

onboarding.add_first_company_subtitle: Add your first company to get started.
onboarding.step1_subtitle: Choose your entity type to get started.
onboarding.step2_subtitle: These details appear on invoices and documents.
onboarding.step3_subtitle: Enter your tax registration and fiscal year.
onboarding.period_error_end_after_start: The end date must be after the start date.
onboarding.period_error_start_first: The start date must be the 1st of a month.
onboarding.period_error_end_last_day: The end date must be the last day of a month.
onboarding.period_error_max_18: The fiscal year cannot exceed 18 months (BFL 3 kap.).
onboarding.period_error_invalid: Invalid fiscal year. Check the dates and try again.
onboarding.toast_create_failed: Could not create company. Please try again.
onboarding.toast_company_exists_description: This company already exists in {appName}. Ask an existing administrator to invite you.
onboarding.toast_org_invalid_description: Check that you entered a valid 10- or 12-digit organisation number.
onboarding.toast_unexpected_error: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.
onboarding.check_all_fields: Check that all fields are filled in correctly.
onboarding.step1_ef_description: You run a business in your own name with an F-skatt certificate
onboarding.step1_ab_description: You have a registered AB with an organisation number
onboarding.step2_card_desc_tic: Enter the organisation number and the remaining details will be fetched automatically.
onboarding.step2_card_desc_ab: Enter the company's registered name and organisation number.
onboarding.step2_card_desc_ef: Enter the name of your business.
onboarding.step2_org_help_ef: For enskild firma, the org number is the same as your personnummer
onboarding.step2_lookup_not_found: No company found with that organisation number.
onboarding.step2_lookup_failed: Could not fetch company details. You can fill them in manually.
onboarding.step2_company_exists: This company already exists in {appName}. Ask an existing administrator to invite you.
onboarding.step2_company_name_ef: Business name (or your name for EF) *
onboarding.step3_card_description: These details are used to calculate your tax situation.
onboarding.step3_broken_year_title: Are you sure about a non-calendar fiscal year?
onboarding.step3_broken_year_description: You've chosen a fiscal year that doesn't follow the calendar year (ending {endLabel}). Most Swedish companies use the calendar year (1 January – 31 December). You can change this later in settings, but only before you've posted anything.
onboarding.step3_fskatt_tip_body: F-skatt means you are responsible for paying tax and contributions to Skatteverket each month yourself.
onboarding.step3_fskatt_tip_note: Most business owners have F-skatt. Without F-skatt, your customers must withhold tax from your invoices.
onboarding.step3_fskatt_help: F-skatt means you are responsible for paying tax and contributions yourself.
onboarding.step3_fy_tip_body: Your fiscal year determines the period you keep books for. Most companies use the calendar year (Jan–Dec).
onboarding.step3_fy_tip_ef_note: Enskild firma must use the calendar year per BFL 3 kap.
onboarding.step3_fy_question: Which fiscal year are you bookkeeping for?
onboarding.step3_start_help: The date the company was registered. The first fiscal year can start any day.
onboarding.step3_no_valid_end: No valid end period found. Check the start date.
onboarding.step3_ef_calendar_required: Enskild firma must use the calendar year per BFL 3 kap.
onboarding.step3_when_fy_ends: When does the company's fiscal year end?
onboarding.step3_calendar_or_broken: Most use the calendar year (December). A non-calendar fiscal year ends in another month.
onboarding.step4_card_description: Enter your VAT registration and choose an accounting method.
onboarding.step4_vat_tip_title: Do I need to register for VAT?
onboarding.step4_vat_tip_body: Yes, if your turnover exceeds SEK 120,000 per year. With VAT you add 25% to your invoices but can also deduct VAT on your purchases.
onboarding.step4_vat_tip_note: If your turnover exceeds SEK 120,000 per year you need to register for VAT.
onboarding.step4_vat_registered_help: Required if your turnover exceeds SEK 120,000 per year.
onboarding.step4_vat_period_tip_title: How often do you report VAT?
onboarding.step4_vat_period_tip_body: Choose the period stated on Verksamt or in your decision from Skatteverket.
onboarding.step4_vat_period_bracket_low: Under SEK 1 million/year = Can choose yearly
onboarding.step4_period_help: Choose the period stated in your decision from Skatteverket. Usually quarterly or yearly.
onboarding.step4_method_tip: Faktureringsmetoden posts revenue and expenses when the invoice is sent/received. Kontantmetoden posts at payment.
onboarding.step4_method_accrual_desc: Revenue and expenses are posted when the invoice is sent or received, regardless of when payment occurs. This gives a more accurate view of the business's finances.
onboarding.step4_method_cash_desc: Revenue and expenses are posted only when payment actually occurs. Simpler to manage but gives a less precise view of the business's finances at any given moment.
onboarding.step4_cash_limit_note: Kontantmetoden may be used if annual net turnover is normally at most SEK 3 million (BFL 5 kap. 2 §).

select_company.subtitle: Choose a company to open or add a new one.
select_company.progress_provision: Creating company and chart of accounts
select_company.enrichment_stale: The information from BankID is more than a week old. Sign in with BankID again to refresh the list.
select_company.ask_admin_invite: Ask an existing administrator to invite you.
select_company.no_companies_found: No companies found. Add your first company below.
select_company.toast_lookup_failed_description: Fill in the remaining details manually.
select_company.toast_company_ceased_description: You cannot set up bookkeeping for a deregistered company.
select_company.toast_company_exists_description: Ask an existing administrator to invite you.
select_company.toast_create_failed_description: Try again or add it manually.

companies_new.step1_subtitle: Choose an entity type for the new company.
companies_new.step2_subtitle: These details appear on invoices and documents.
companies_new.period_error_end_after_start: The end date must be after the start date.
companies_new.period_error_start_first: The start date must be the 1st of a month.
companies_new.period_error_end_last_day: The end date must be the last day of a month.
companies_new.period_error_max_18: The fiscal year cannot exceed 18 months (BFL 3 kap.).
companies_new.period_error_invalid: Invalid fiscal year. Check the dates and try again.
companies_new.toast_no_team: Could not find team. Reload the page.
companies_new.toast_create_failed: Could not create company. Please try again.
companies_new.toast_switched_to_new: You have now switched to the new company.
companies_new.toast_unexpected_error: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.

invite.contact_inviter: Contact the person who invited you for a new invitation.
invite.expired_description: Ask the person who invited you to send a new invitation.
invite.invited_to_company: You've been invited as a member of this company.
invite.wrong_account: The invitation was sent to {invitedEmail}, but you are signed in as {currentEmail}.
invite.signout_then_login: Sign out and sign in again with the correct account to join.
invite.existing_account: {email} already has an account on {appName}. Sign in to join.
invite.terms_notice: By creating an account you agree to our terms.
invite.unexpected_error: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.
invite.joined_named: You are now a member of {companyName}.

settings_company.company_name_help: Shown on invoices, emails and declaration files. For a sole trader it is usually your own name (First Last).
settings_company.org_number_locked: Cannot be changed after the account has been created
settings_company.members_invite_description: The person gets access to this company only.
settings_company.logo_help: Shown in the header of your invoices. Max 2 MB, PNG/JPG/SVG.
settings_company.logo_pick_or_drop: Choose a file or drop one here
settings_company.fp_intro: If you picked the wrong fiscal year at setup you can adjust it here — as long as no vouchers have been posted yet.
settings_company.fp_warning_body: The change affects opening balances and reports.
settings_company.fp_warning_ef_suffix: Enskild firma must use a calendar year per BFL 3 kap.
settings_company.fp_end_date_help: Must be the last day of a month.
settings_company.fp_confirm_description: This changes your first fiscal year from {oldStart} – {oldEnd} to {newStart} – {newEnd}. The change is only allowed because no vouchers have been posted yet. Continue?
settings_company.fp_blocked_title: Fiscal year can no longer be changed
settings_company.fp_blocked_reason_posted: {count, plural, =1 {# posted voucher already exists in the period.} other {# posted vouchers already exist in the period.}}
settings_company.fp_blocked_explainer: If you have to start over you can delete the company at the bottom of this page and create a new one. Bookkeeping data is retained for 7 years per BFL 7 kap. 2§.
settings_company.danger_dialog_description: The company is hidden from {appName}. The bookkeeping is retained securely for 7 years per BFL. Type the company name exactly to confirm.
settings_company.wrapper_readonly_tooltip: You have read-only access to this company

settings_bookkeeping.method_help: The cash method may be used if annual net sales are normally at most 3 MSEK (BFL 5 kap. 2 §). Outstanding receivables and payables must be posted at year-end.
settings_bookkeeping.series_help: Which series is preselected for manual bookkeeping. Can be changed per voucher.

settings_salary.title: Payroll settings
settings_salary.voucher_series_help: Can be changed per payroll run. Each series has unbroken voucher numbers per fiscal year.
settings_salary.tax_tables_help: Tax tables and municipal tax rates are fetched automatically from Skatteverket's open data on every payroll run. No manual update is needed. If Skatteverket's API is unavailable, an embedded fallback copy is used until the service is back.
settings_salary.vacation_supplement_help: Applied with sammalöneregeln. Can be overridden per employee.
settings_salary.info_payroll_scope: The payroll module handles salaries for aktiebolag. Enskild firma owners use eget uttag instead.

settings_backup.heading: Backup
settings_backup.intro: Download your own copy of all accounting data — SIE files, receipts, supporting documents and processing history — in a single ZIP file. The backup is your own copy for safety and portability. {appName} archives all accounting data for at least 7 years per BFL 7 kap. 2 §, so your backup does not replace our legal obligation — it complements it.

settings_banking.sync_start_description: Fetching transactions from your bank in the background.
settings_banking.sync_timeout_description: Transactions are being fetched in the background. Reload the page in a moment.
settings_banking.access_denied_hint: {bankName} denied access. If you're using a personal account you can try connecting with the account type "Privatkonto" in the bank picker below.
settings_banking.import_fallback_link: import transactions from a bank file
settings_banking.not_enabled_description: Enable the Enable Banking extension to link your bank account and fetch transactions automatically.

settings_skatteverket.connected_description: You can now file declarations and fetch the tax account balance.

settings_account_danger.heading: Delete account
settings_account_danger.blockers_description: Delete or hand over all companies before you delete your account.
settings_account_danger.dialog_description: Your account is anonymised and you are signed out of all devices. You cannot create a new account with the same email address — contact support if you want to reactivate the account in the future.
settings_account_danger.confirm_label: Type your email address ({email}) to confirm
settings_account_danger.delete_failed_blockers: You must delete or hand over your companies first.

settings_bank_details_form.heading: Bank details
settings_bank_details_form.swish_placeholder: 123 XXX XX XX or 07X XXX XX XX
settings_bank_details_form.swish_error: Invalid Swish number (business number 123XXXXXXX or mobile number 07XXXXXXXX)

settings_pdf_print.heading: Print & PDF
settings_pdf_print.ore_rounding_help: Round invoice total to whole krona
settings_pdf_print.show_ocr_help: Show OCR number on invoice printout
settings_pdf_print.show_bankgiro_help: Show bankgiro number on invoice printout
settings_pdf_print.show_plusgiro_help: Show plusgiro number on invoice printout
settings_pdf_print.show_swish_help: Show Swish number on invoice printout
settings_pdf_print.show_logo_help: Show uploaded logo in the invoice header
settings_pdf_print.show_company_name_help: Display the company name on the invoice
settings_pdf_print.late_fee_placeholder: E.g. Payments after the due date incur interest per the Swedish Interest Act.
settings_pdf_print.credit_terms_placeholder: E.g. Payment is made to the specified bankgiro.

settings_period_locking.heading: Period locking
settings_period_locking.locked_through_help: Vouchers dated before this date cannot be created or modified.
settings_period_locking.auto_lock_help: Automatically locks periods after the chosen number of days.

settings_voucher_series.heading: Verifikationsserier
settings_voucher_series.empty_state: No voucher series yet. Series {series} is created automatically with the first voucher.
settings_voucher_series.footnote: New series are created automatically the first time they are used in bookkeeping.

settings_booking_templates.title: Bookkeeping templates
settings_booking_templates.description: Reusable templates for common bookkeeping transactions. Standard templates are shown to everyone; you can create and share your own.
settings_booking_templates.description_placeholder: When should this template be used?

settings_counterparty_templates.title: Bookkeeping templates
settings_counterparty_templates.description: Learned patterns that suggest postings automatically based on the counterparty. Templates are created from SIE imports and when you approve categorizations.
settings_counterparty_templates.empty_help: Templates are created automatically when you categorize transactions or import a SIE file.

settings_tax_form.entity_form_help: Company form cannot be changed. Contact support if needed.
settings_tax_form.vat_registered_help: Mandatory if turnover exceeds SEK 120,000 per year.
settings_tax_form.periodisk_help: EU goods sales must normally be reported monthly (35 ch. 2 § SFL). Quarterly requires approval from Skatteverket and only applies to services.
settings_tax_form.tax_contact_help: Used as sender on files to Skatteverket (EU sales list, etc.).
settings_tax_form.fiscal_year_ef_help: Enskild firma must use the calendar year (BFL ch. 3).
settings_tax_form.fiscal_year_change_help: The change affects future fiscal years.
settings_tax_form.pays_salaries_help: Affects which tax deadlines are shown (employer declarations, etc.).
settings_tax_form.preliminary_tax_monthly_help: Amount in SEK paid each month.

settings_backup_download.include_docs_help: Voucher attachments (receipts, invoices, PDFs) are packed in the ZIP. Turn off for a smaller backup with bookkeeping data only.
settings_backup_download.size_will_calculate: Size is calculated when scope is selected.
settings_backup_download.over_limit_message: The archive is larger than {limit} and cannot be downloaded directly. Pick a single period or disable attachments for now — automatic cloud sync is coming in a later version.
settings_backup_download.toast_too_large_title: Archive too large for direct download
settings_backup_download.toast_too_large_with_size: Your archive is about {size} MB. Export one period at a time for now — automatic cloud sync is coming in a later version.
settings_backup_download.toast_too_large_generic: Export one period at a time for now — automatic cloud sync is coming in a later version.
settings_backup_download.cloud_sync_disabled_help: Enable the "Cloud sync" extension to connect Google Drive and upload your backup with one click.

settings_api_keys.title: API keys
settings_api_keys.description: Manage keys for MCP clients (Claude, Cursor) and other integrations.
settings_api_keys.revoke_dialog_description: "{name}" will be permanently revoked. Any clients using the key will stop working immediately.
settings_api_keys.empty_help: Create a key to connect your MCP client.
settings_api_keys.claude_ai_instructions: Go to <path>Settings → Integrations → Add Integration</path> and paste the MCP server URL. You sign in via your {connectorName} account — no API key needed.
settings_api_keys.terminal_runs_browser_login: Run in the terminal — sign in via the browser:
settings_api_keys.connect_with_api_key: Connect with an API key instead
settings_api_keys.terminal_with_api_key: Run in the terminal with an API key:
settings_api_keys.create_dialog_description: Name the key so you remember what it's for.
settings_api_keys.permissions_help: Choose what the key should have access to.
settings_api_keys.new_key_dialog_description: Copy the key now. It is shown only once.
settings_api_keys.scope_transactions_read: Read — list transactions, templates, categories, inbox
settings_api_keys.scope_transactions_write: Write — categorize, receipt matching, link to invoice, document upload
settings_api_keys.scope_invoices_write: Write — create, send, mark paid/sent, credit, convert
settings_api_keys.scope_suppliers_read: Read — list suppliers and supplier invoices
settings_api_keys.scope_suppliers_write: Write — approve, credit, create supplier invoice from inbox
settings_api_keys.scope_reports_read: Read — chart of accounts, general ledger, BS, IS, VAT, KPI, ledgers, periods, bank reconciliation, SIE export
settings_api_keys.scope_bookkeeping_write: Write — close/lock periods, opening balances, year-end, SIE import, vouchers, corrections (all staged)
settings_api_keys.scope_payroll_read: Read — list employees, salary runs, salary journal
settings_api_keys.scope_payroll_write: Write — create salary run, calculate, generate AGI
settings_api_keys.scope_pending_operations_approve: Approve — commit or reject staged ops via API (replaces web UI review)
settings_api_keys.scope_documents_read: Read — list and fetch document attachments
settings_api_keys.scope_documents_write: Write — upload and link documents to vouchers
settings_api_keys.scope_companies_read: Read — company profiles the key has access to
settings_api_keys.scope_events_read: Read — poll event_log as a webhook fallback
settings_api_keys.scope_webhooks_manage: Manage — create, list, update, delete subscriptions
settings_api_keys.scope_operations_read: Read — status of long-running operations (import, year-end, revaluation)
settings_api_keys.scope_compliance_read: Read — pre-flight: VAT closing, year-end readiness, voucher gaps, IB/UB continuity

settings_oauth_clients.title: OAuth clients
settings_oauth_clients.description: Register redirect URIs for self-built MCP clients. Claude.ai and localhost are already allowed by default — only register here if you're building your own app.
settings_oauth_clients.revoke_dialog_description: "{name}" will be removed from the allowlist. Ongoing auth flows stop working immediately; already issued API keys remain valid until revoked separately.
settings_oauth_clients.empty_help: Building an agent that connects via OAuth? Register its callback URI here.
settings_oauth_clients.register_dialog_description: Only for self-built MCP clients with a public HTTPS callback. Do not add localhost or claude.ai — they already work without registration. The URI is compared verbatim against the redirect_uri parameter in the OAuth flow.

settings_skatteverket_connect.title: Skatteverket
settings_skatteverket_connect.disabled_message: The Skatteverket integration is temporarily disabled. Contact support.
settings_skatteverket_connect.connect_intro: Connect to Skatteverket with BankID to submit VAT declarations, employer declarations and fetch the tax account balance.
settings_skatteverket_connect.skahmst_note: On Skatteverket's consent page one of the permissions appears as skahmst (Rubrik saknas) — that's the scope name for tax account balance and transactions (Skattekonto HuvudMan STatus). Skatteverket has not yet published a Swedish description. It's safe to approve.
settings_skatteverket_connect.missing_skattekonto: The Skattekonto permission is missing — disconnect and reconnect to enable the balance and transactions view.
settings_skatteverket_connect.missing_agd: The employer declaration (AGI) permission is missing — disconnect and reconnect to send AGI directly from gnubok. Tokens issued before AGI support was activated lack this scope.
settings_skatteverket_connect.disabled_filings_message: The Skatteverket integration is temporarily disabled. Filings are inactive.

settings_bankid.title: BankID
settings_bankid.toast_already_linked: This BankID is already linked to another account.
settings_bankid.link_bankid_description: Scan the QR code with the BankID app
settings_bankid.linked_description: Your account is linked to BankID.
settings_bankid.not_linked_description: Link BankID for more secure sign-in.

settings_security.toast_weak_password_description: The password must be at least 8 characters and include uppercase, lowercase, digits and a special character.
settings_security.toast_mismatch_description: Check that you typed the same password in both fields.
settings_security.toast_mfa_disabled_description: 2FA has been removed from your account.
settings_security.change_password_description: Update your password. If you sign in with an email link, you can set a password here.
settings_security.mfa_description: Protect your account with an authenticator app. At every sign-in you'll need to enter a code in addition to your password.
settings_security.mfa_active_description: Your account is protected with two-factor authentication.
settings_security.mfa_required_note: Two-factor authentication is mandatory and cannot be disabled.

settings_calendar_feed.title: Calendar sync
settings_calendar_feed.description: Sync your deadlines with Apple Calendar, Google Calendar or Outlook
settings_calendar_feed.subscribe_description: Subscribe to your calendar in Apple Calendar, Google Calendar or Outlook
settings_calendar_feed.toast_feed_created_description: You can now connect the calendar to Apple Calendar or Google Calendar.
settings_calendar_feed.regen_dialog_description: The old link stops working immediately. You'll need to update the link in any calendar app that uses it.
settings_calendar_feed.toast_new_link_description: The old link no longer works.
settings_calendar_feed.toast_copied_description: The link was copied to the clipboard.
settings_calendar_feed.empty_intro: Create a calendar feed to see your deadlines in your usual calendar app.
settings_calendar_feed.calendar_link_help: Copy this link and add it as a URL subscription in your calendar app.
settings_calendar_feed.regen_help: Invalidates the old link. Use it if the link has been exposed.
settings_calendar_feed.content_description: Choose which events appear in your calendar

invoice_editor.bank_missing_warning: Payment details missing — you need to add them before creating an invoice.

invoice_editor.review_warning_invoice_accrual: An invoice is created and assigned an invoice number. When it is sent or marked as sent, a journal entry (verifikat) is posted; it cannot be edited directly but can be corrected via a credit note.
invoice_editor.review_warning_invoice_cash: An invoice is created and assigned an invoice number. The journal entry (verifikat) is only posted when the invoice is marked as paid (cash method).
invoice_editor.review_warning_proforma: A proforma invoice is created. No journal entry is posted. The proforma can later be converted to a real invoice.
invoice_editor.review_warning_delivery_note: A delivery note is created without prices. No journal entry is posted.

retention_notice.company_body_prefix: Under Swedish accounting law (BFL 7 kap. 2§), accounting records must be retained for 7 years. When you delete the company it is hidden in {appName}, but journal entries, documents and bookkeeping are kept safely until the legal retention period expires. You can
retention_notice.account_body_prefix: Your account is anonymized and you are signed out of all devices. Accounting records from companies you owned are retained safely for 7 years under BFL 7 kap. 2§. You cannot create a new account with the same email address — contact support if you want to reactivate the account in the future. Feel free to download a

journal_correction.title: Correction chain
journal_correction.info: Posted journal entries cannot be edited directly. Instead, a storno entry is created that reverses the original, and a new correction entry with the correct details.

journal_detail.read_only_tooltip: You have read-only access to this company
journal_detail.delete_warning_draft: The draft has never been posted and can be removed without affecting the voucher sequence. Any linked documents are kept but unlinked. This action cannot be undone.
journal_detail.delete_warning_entry: Journal entry {voucher} will be permanently deleted. Any linked documents are kept but unlinked. This action cannot be undone.
journal_detail.delete_dialog_draft_body: The draft and its entry lines are removed. Linked invoices and transactions are not affected — they remain unposted. Documents (receipts, files) are kept but unlinked.
journal_detail.delete_dialog_entry_body: The journal entry and its lines are removed. Linked transactions and invoices keep their data but are marked as unposted. Documents (receipts, files) are kept but unlinked.

journal_form.internal_note_placeholder: E.g. reason for posting, reference to email, etc.
journal_form.no_period_warning: No fiscal year matches the date {date}
journal_form.no_period_help: Create a fiscal year that covers this date so you can post it.
journal_form.save_draft_tooltip: Saves as a draft without assigning a voucher number
journal_form.read_only_tooltip: You have read-only access to this company
journal_form.validation_no_matching_period: Create a fiscal year that matches the date
journal_form.validation_uploading: Wait until files have finished uploading
journal_form.validation_incomplete_lines: All lines with an amount must have an account (and vice versa)
journal_form.validation_min_lines: At least two lines with account and amount are required
journal_form.review_warning: A journal entry is created and cannot be edited afterwards. Corrections are made via storno.
journal_form.no_doc_dialog_warning: No document attached. Under the Swedish Accounting Act (BFL 5 kap. 6-7 §§) every accounting entry must have a verification as supporting document. You can attach one now or continue without.
journal_form.toast_draft_saved_description: The draft can be posted from the bookkeeping page.
journal_form.toast_attach_failed_description: {count} file(s) could not be linked to the journal entry. Try again from the bookkeeping page.

chart_of_accounts.toast_activated_description: Account {number} has been added to your chart of accounts

tic_workspace.no_org_number_description: Enter an organisation number under Settings to view the company profile.
tic_workspace.fetch_failed_description: Check that the organisation number in settings is correct and try again.
tic_workspace.time_days_ago: {n, plural, one {# day ago} other {# days ago}}

extensions.page_description: Extend your bookkeeping system with tools and industry-specific features.
extensions.ext_enable_banking_description: Automatic bank transaction sync via PSD2
extensions.ext_enable_banking_long_description: Connect your bank account directly and sync transactions automatically via secure PSD2 bank integration. Supports most Swedish banks.
extensions.ext_email_description: Send invoices and reminders via email
extensions.ext_email_long_description: Enables email features: send invoices to customers, automatic payment reminders (15/30/45 days), and email notifications. Requires a Resend account with a verified domain.
extensions.ext_arcim_migration_description: Migrate bookkeeping from Fortnox, Visma, Bokio, Björn Lundén or Briox
extensions.ext_arcim_migration_long_description: Move all bookkeeping data from your old system to gnubok. Imports chart of accounts, vouchers, customers, suppliers and open invoices automatically via a secure API integration directly with the provider.
extensions.ext_tic_description: Fetch company information automatically at signup
extensions.ext_tic_long_description: Auto-fill company details by entering an organization number. Retrieves address, VAT registration, F-tax status and bank details from public registries via TIC.
extensions.ext_mcp_server_description: Do bookkeeping via Claude, Cursor or another MCP client
extensions.ext_mcp_server_long_description: Exposes gnubok's bookkeeping engine as MCP tools (Model Context Protocol). Connect your MCP client with an API key and do bookkeeping through conversation: list uncategorized transactions, book them, create invoices.
extensions.ext_cloud_backup_description: Sync backups to your own cloud storage
extensions.ext_cloud_backup_long_description: Connect your Google Drive account and upload a full backup with one click. Gnubok creates a ZIP with SIE files, receipts and processing history and uploads it to a dedicated folder in your Drive. Perfect for meeting your own redundancy requirements.
extensions.ext_skatteverket_description: Submit the VAT declaration directly to Skatteverket via BankID.
extensions.ext_skatteverket_long_description: Connect to Skatteverket with BankID and submit your VAT declaration directly from gnubok. Save drafts, validate, lock and sign — without leaving the app.
extensions.ext_invoice_inbox_description: Forward supplier invoices to a unique address — documents land here with extracted fields
extensions.ext_invoice_inbox_long_description: Each company gets a unique invoice inbox address. Invoices sent there are captured automatically and fields such as org. no., OCR, bankgiro, amount and due date are extracted deterministically from the PDF text. No AI calls, no cloud services beyond Resend for email delivery.

fiscal_year.label: Fiscal year
fiscal_year.tooltip_locked: The fiscal year is locked — no journal entries can be added or changed
fiscal_year.tooltip_closed: The fiscal year is closed (year-end filed) — can be reopened by an admin

kpi.title: KPIs
kpi.empty_no_kpis_chosen: No KPIs selected. Click "Customize" to choose which ones to show.
kpi.top_suppliers_empty: No supplier invoices registered in the period
kpi.def_netResult_description: Net result for the period (revenue minus expenses)
kpi.def_netResult_formula: Total revenue − Total expenses ± Financial items
kpi.def_cashPosition_description: Total cash and equivalents (bank and cash accounts)
kpi.def_cashPosition_formula: Sum of closing balances for selected 19xx accounts
kpi.def_vatLiability_description: VAT liability or receivable for the period
kpi.def_grossMargin_description: Share of revenue remaining after cost of goods
kpi.def_expenseRatio_description: Share of revenue going to expenses
kpi.def_avgPaymentDays_formula: Sum of payment days ÷ Number of paid invoices (min 5 required)
kpi.def_avgPaymentDays_accounts: Calculated from paid customer invoices, not accounts
kpi.settings_subtitle: Choose which KPIs to show and adjust their calculations.
kpi.settings_account_hint: Enter account numbers separated by commas (e.g. {example})

import.title: Import
import.subtitle: Import bank transactions or bookkeeping data into your company

empty.invoices_description: Create your first invoice to get started.
